description_long: This apartment building features two main rectangular structures connected by a lower central section, all set on a flat base. The taller section has multiple floors with regularly spaced windows and a flat roof, while the shorter section also has a flat roof and fewer floors. Both sections are topped with reddish-brown roof elements that add a touch of color contrast to the otherwise neutral facade. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, with the window frames and balcony railings in darker shades. The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, giving the building a balanced and orderly appearance. The entrance appears to be centrally located at the base of the taller section, accessible from the front.
description: A modern apartment building with two connected rectangular volumes, flat roofs, and symmetrically arranged windows. The facade is light gray with reddish-brown roof accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the taller section with multiple floors, central entrance, and vertical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the L-shaped layout, the connection between the two building volumes, and the flat roofs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both building sections, with the shorter section in front and the taller section behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the L-shaped layout, mirroring the features seen in view 1.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with regular spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly facade on both main building sections.
